ClientId.title: Client ID
ClientId.description: Constant Contact OAuth 2.0 Client ID (also called API Key).

ClientSecret.title: Client Secret
ClientSecret.description: Constant Contact OAuth 2.0 Client Secret (also called App Secret).

AccessToken.title: Access Token
AccessToken.description: Current OAuth access token. Refreshed automatically when expired.

RefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
RefreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token. Rotates on every refresh.
